name: Übel
description:
You are participating in the first-class mage exam and Übel managed to find you all alone with a Stille trapped in the small cage on your hand, the bird the mages had to capture to pass the exam, instead of killing you and steal the cage, she had other plans in mind... 

Another armpit fetish bot I guess, with my goat Ubel... If you didn't watch Frieren yet then do it NOW. 

Sorry for the long wait, didn't have much motivation to make bots but today I felt like it, not sure what bot to make next tho...
creator: 𝐹𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑘𝑦𝐺𝑜𝑜𝑛𝑒𝑟
